MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Jewish Family & Children's Services.

Mr. Der reported that he e-filed the proof of service this weekend, that it had been waylaid at is office and that the notice has been reserved. The accounting petition was continued to March 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Mr. Der stated that they need to file a supplement to the petition regarding fees, that the trust is currently down to $2,000.00 and that the supplement will be in case funds appear in the future and that time records will be attached to the supplement. The accounting petition was continued to September 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-07-290499 Conservatorship of Ryu Makoto.

Appearances: Karen Mitchell for and with Ryu Makoto. Ernest Der for Jewish Family & Children's Services ("JFCS"). Michael Levy (Case Manager JFCS) also present.

The Parties addressed Mr. Makoto's concerns. Both accounting petitions were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
